Transaction expected to be a major transaction under Listing Rule 1015; no MGO under the Singapore Code on Take-overs and Mergers as target is private.
MAC/MAE: closing condition waived except for revocation of core Energy Market Authority permits; general market downturns excluded; due diligence shows no material adverse change since 31 Mar 2026.

Timeline: sign by 05 Jul 2026, announce via SGXNet immediately after embargo lifts, closing in Q4 2026; Board blackout continues until release.
Compliance: This memo contains MNPI under the SFA and SGX Listing Manual; maintain insider list per s.218; PDPA note—collect only necessary personal data, avoid NRIC scans in VDR.
Public references (non-MNPI): sector growth from 2024 SGX update and a 2021 industry blog; Obsidian’s 2023 revenue S$80m per public ACRA abstracts.

must_detect.matched_text:
NON-PUBLIC — Board Memorandum — Embargo until 12 Jul 2026 18:00 SGT — Project Lantern
Caravel Pacific Holdings Ltd. (Mainboard-listed on SGX-ST) to acquire 62.5% of Obsidian Renewables Pte. Ltd. for approx. S$248,000,000 in cash; binding term sheet signed 20 Jun 2026, definitive SPA in near-final form.
Transaction expected to be a major transaction under Listing Rule 1015; no MGO under the Singapore Code on Take-overs and Mergers as target is private.
MAC/MAE: closing condition waived except for revocation of core Energy Market Authority permits; general market downturns excluded; due diligence shows no material adverse change since 31 Mar 2026.
Financing: S$120,000,000 bridge from Shoreline Bank (SG) Ltd.; balance from internal resources; net debt cap at completion S$18m; expected EPS accretion ~11% in FY2027.
Timeline: sign by 05 Jul 2026, announce via SGXNet immediately after embargo lifts, closing in Q4 2026; Board blackout continues until release.
Compliance: This memo contains MNPI under the SFA and SGX Listing Manual; maintain insider list per s.218; PDPA note—collect only necessary personal data, avoid NRIC scans in VDR.
Public references (non-MNPI): sector growth from 2024 SGX update and a 2021 industry blog; Obsidian’s 2023 revenue S$80m per public ACRA abstracts.
ocr noise/refs: Data room https://cp-holdings.example/d/lantern?auth=O0l-7Z9q ; Vendor A/C: 1I-8O-3X-xx at Cit y Br anch; UEN (target): 2O16 1 2 7 4 9 E F.
IR draft notes: todo: align ir faq; no change to FY2026 guidance; include non-IFRS bridge; draft investor call deck T+1; strictly con fi den tial // do not forward.
Conditions precedent: key customer consents, EMA notification, and no prohibition by MAS; long-stop 30 Nov 2026; warranties capped at 12% of price with 18-month survival.
Negative/benign: this is not a press release; team reminder: book meeting rooms; spa-day e-vouchers for staff wellness are not part of deal consideration.
Contacts: Ms. Alina Tey (General Counsel), alina.tey@caravelpacific.com; Mr. Daren Khoo (CFO), d.khoo@caravelpacific.com; deal desk +65 6l2l 0O88.
This document contains embargoed price-sensitive information; do not trade in Caravel securities until public disclosure.
